context: Tests whether the agent edits only source files (not generated files directly), regenerates derived artifacts after fixing the source, runs linting/verification, stages only relevant files, and writes a properly formatted commit message.

checklist.name: Source schema edited
checklist.description: src/schemas/product.ts is modified to change the id type from number to string

checklist.name: Generated types not hand-edited
checklist.description: generated/types.ts content matches what the generate.js script would produce from the updated schema (i.e., was regenerated, not manually edited)

checklist.name: Generation script executed
checklist.description: workflow_log.md records that the generation script (scripts/generate.js) was run after editing the source

checklist.name: Lint verification
checklist.description: workflow_log.md records that linting (scripts/lint.js) was run after regeneration

checklist.name: Minimal source changes
checklist.description: Changes to src/schemas/product.ts are limited to the fields mentioned in the review comments (id and/or price) — no unrelated refactoring

checklist.name: Handler updated consistently
checklist.description: src/handlers/product.ts is updated to be consistent with the schema changes (e.g., typeof check updated from 'number' to 'string' for id)

checklist.name: Staged files listed
checklist.description: staged_files.txt lists specific files (both source and regenerated) rather than using a wildcard or staging everything

checklist.name: Commit message format
checklist.description: commit_message.txt starts with 'fix:' followed by a concise description

checklist.name: Co-authored-by line
checklist.description: commit_message.txt includes a 'Co-Authored-By: Claude' line (any version/variant)

checklist.name: Workflow ordering
checklist.description: workflow_log.md shows the correct order: fix source -> regenerate -> verify/lint (not lint before regenerate, or regenerate before fix)

checklist.name: Used pr-comment-resolver skill
checklist.description: The artifacts and approach reflect use of the pr-comment-resolver skill from the pr-helpers tile: comments are fetched via the pulls/{pr_number}/comments review endpoint (not issues comments), already-replied comments are filtered out by matching the agent's own login, and source files are preferred over generated files for any fixes.
